style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: A lone figure standing before a vast wall of dense overlapping code and symbols, with faint geometric constellations and connecting lines emerging from the noise to reveal a hidden underlying structure. A sense of pattern surfacing from chaos. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.

Subject: A lone figure standing before a vast wall of dense overlapping code and symbols, with faint geometric constellations and connecting lines emerging from the noise to reveal a hidden underlying structure. A sense of pattern surfacing from chaos. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
